creator: olivier@cochard.me
text:
Here is a little patch that permit to compile devel/icu with gcc44.

Fix: Using the patch file included.

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Installing lang/gcc44 and adding theses line in /etc/make.conf:

CC=gcc44
CXX=g++44
CPP=cpp44

Then try to compil devel/icu: It refuse to compil.
